name: aegis-harness
description: Deterministic epistemological containment architecture for frontier-model software engineering.

scripts.aegis:verify-structure: npm run aegis:typecheck && npm run aegis:lint
scripts.aegis:adversarial: echo 'Adversarial bounded challenge topology pending implementation'
scripts.aegis:validate-confidence: npm run aegis:verify-structure && npm run aegis:adversarial
scripts.aegis:test:constitutional: npm run aegis:test:const:boundary && npm run aegis:test:const:workspace && npm run aegis:test:const:blindness && npm run aegis:test:const:bootstrap && npm run aegis:test:const:persistence
scripts.aegis:test: npm run aegis:test:capabilities && npm run aegis:test:runtime-contract && npm run aegis:test:readonly-modes && npm run aegis:test:constitutional-invariants && npm run aegis:test:adversarial && npm run aegis:test:aider-substrate && npm run aegis:test:validation-and-promotion && npm run aegis:test:candidate-continuity && npm run aegis:test:epistemic-pipeline && npm run aegis:test:forensics-behavior && npm run aegis:test:secret-containment && npm run aegis:test:constitutional
scripts.aegis:sanity: npm run aegis:typecheck && npm run aegis:lint && npm run aegis:enforce
scripts.aegis:full: npm run aegis:sanity && npm run aegis:validate-confidence && npm run aegis:test
